mapper.sql: (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT A.mng_no, B.if_idx, COALESCE(NULLIF(A.user_dev_name, ''), A.dev_name) AS dev_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(B.user_if_name, ''), B.if_name) AS if_name, B.if_alias, B.line_width, B.profile_no FROM cm_dev10 A, cm_dev20 B, ( SELECT mng_no1 AS mng_no, if_idx1 AS if_idx FROM cm_topo_link WHERE user_id = AND link_no = #{linkNo} AND mng_no1 IS NOT NULL AND if_idx1 IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT mng_no2, if_idx2 FROM cm_topo_link WHERE user_id = AND link_no = #{linkNo} AND mng_no2 IS NOT NULL AND if_idx2 IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT mng_no, if_idx FROM cm_topo_link_multi WHERE user_id = AND link_no = #{linkNo} ) C WHERE A.mng_no = B.mng_no AND A.mng_no = C.mng_no AND B.if_idx = C.if_idx
